description_long: This is a high-performance racing coupe car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a prominent rear wing for downforce. The body is predominantly white with blue accents and detailed sponsor decals, including Castrol and Nokia, giving it a professional motorsport appearance. The front features a pointed nose cone, wide front wing, and exposed suspension arms, while the sides display sculpted air intakes and streamlined side pods. The cockpit is open, with a single seat and visible roll hoop behind the driver, typical of Formula-style race cars. Large, slick racing tires are mounted on black wheels, and the rear showcases a substantial diffuser and dual exhaust outlets. The overall design emphasizes speed, agility, and advanced engineering for competitive racing environments.
description: A sleek, white and blue racing coupe car with sponsor decals, open cockpit, and aerodynamic wings, designed for high-speed motorsport. Features include large slick tires, a prominent rear wing, and a streamlined body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, wide front wing, and open cockpit with visible suspension arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sculpted side pods, sponsor decals, and large rear wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the prominent rear wing, diffuser, and wide rear tires.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing aerodynamic lines, sponsor logos, and wheel details.
attribute_window_configuration: single open cockpit with no side windows
